title: UnifaceComponent.accept
breadcrumbs: APIs: Java Call-In Classes and Methods
text: UnifaceComponent.accept This method calls the accept trigger. import com.rocketsoftware.uniface.jci.*; int accept() throws UnifaceException; Return Values Returns $status or, in the event of an error, throws a UnifaceException. Description The accept method in the generated Java, or JavaBean, file calls the accept trigger/operation in the Uniface component. Related Links trigger accept Handles processing when an Accept request is received, usually with the intention of closing the component and keeping all changes made on it. This trigger is exposed as an operation in the component signature. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
